ideation: This sequence depicts a person kneeling, focusing on the natural posture of the arms.  The robot's lack of elbows requires careful consideration of how to convey a sense of supplication or rest. The animation will start with arms hanging loosely, then move to a slightly more forward position, and finally a position suggesting rest. Frame 1 shows a neutral position. Frame 2 brings the arms slightly forward. Frame 3 shows the arms at rest. Frame 4 shows the arms more forward again.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly forward, a gentle offering
arms return to a resting, downward pose
arms lift forward again, in humble supplication
